/* TwoWiki Fossil Skin v8
   - Wider 1280px content container with 78ch prose measure
   - Unified report card: status key + search + table flush-stacked
   - Admin / Edit mode action bars (.admin-actionbar) + per-row .row-edit
   - Tag variants: caps, metallic, threed, outline, glow */
* { box-sizing: border-box; }
body, body > div.wiki {
  margin: 0; padding: 0; background-color: #f8f9fa;
  font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Arial, sans-serif;
  font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.6; color: #2d3436;
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; min-height: 100vh;
  display: flex; flex-direction: column;
}

header {
  display: flex; align-items: center; width: 100%; padding: 0 1.25rem; background: #111827;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #000; min-height: 48px;
  position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 21;
}
.logo-area { flex-shrink: 0; margin-right: 0.6rem; display: flex; align-items: center; }
.header-logo { height: 24px; width: 24px; }
.brand {
  flex-shrink: 0; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; letter-spacing: -0.01em;
  margin-right: 1.25rem;
}
div.status { flex-shrink: 0; font-size: 0.78rem; color: #9ca3af; margin-left: auto; padding-left: 1rem; }
.status-user { padding: 0.2em 0.6em; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15); border-radius: 3px; font-size: 0.72rem; color: #cbd5e1; }

header nav.mainmenu {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0; padding: 0;
  font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 500; text-transform: none; letter-spacing: 0;
  background: transparent; color: #e5e7eb; border: none;
  position: static; flex: 1;
}
nav.mainmenu .hbbtn { display: none; background: none; border: none; color: #e5e7eb; padding: 0.6rem; cursor: pointer; }
nav.mainmenu a {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0 0.85rem; height: 48px;
  color: #d1d5db; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.12s, background-color 0.12s;
  border-bottom: 2px solid transparent;
}
nav.mainmenu a:hover { color: #fff; background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); }
nav.mainmenu a.active { color: #fff; border-bottom-color: #3b82f6; background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); font-weight: 600; }

.breadcrumb-bar {
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 0 1.25rem; background: #f9fafb; border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
  font-size: 0.72rem; min-height: 28px; color: #6b7280;
}
.crumbs { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4rem; }
.crumbs a { color: #4b5563; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; }
.crumbs a:hover { color: #111827; text-decoration: underline; }
.crumb-sep { color: #9ca3af; }
.crumb-current { color: #111827; font-weight: 600; }
.crumb-actions { display: flex; gap: 0.85rem; }
.crumb-actions a { color: #4b5563; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; }
.crumb-actions a:hover { color: #111827; text-decoration: underline; }

/* Same column width on /rptview, /tktview, wiki (v8 measure). */
div.content {
  max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0.85rem 2rem 3rem; flex: 1;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
div.content a { color: #1d4ed8; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; }
div.content a:hover { color: #1e40af; text-decoration: underline; }

/* Status key bar */
.status-key {
  display: flex; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.4rem;
  padding: 0.5rem 0.85rem; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #d1d5db;
  border-bottom: none; border-radius: 4px 4px 0 0; margin: 0;
}
.status-key-label {
  font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; color: #374151; text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em; margin-right: 0.4rem;
}

/* Search form */
.searchForm {
  display: flex; gap: 0; margin: 0; max-width: none; width: 100%;
  border: 1px solid #d1d5db; border-top: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
  border-radius: 0; overflow: hidden;
  background: #fff;
  transition: box-shadow 0.15s;
}
.searchForm:focus-within {
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2px #3b78e7;
}
.searchForm input[type="text"] {
  flex: 1; border: none; outline: none; padding: 0.55rem 0.85rem;
  font-size: 0.9rem; color: #111827; background: transparent;
}
.searchForm input[type="text"]::placeholder { color: #9ca3af; }
.searchForm input[type="submit"] {
  border: none; background: #1f2937; color: #fff; padding: 0 1.2rem;
  font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.12s;
}
.searchForm input[type="submit"]:hover { background: #3b78e7; }

.status-pill {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.25em 0.7em;
  font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 2px;
  border: 1px solid; line-height: 1.4; white-space: nowrap;
  text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: #1f2937;
}

/* Per-status colors. Wrap status text in Fossil report SQL like:
     <span class="status-pill status-active">Active</span> */
.status-active   { background: #d94b4b; color: #fff; border-color: #a33333; }
.status-review   { background: #3b78e7; color: #fff; border-color: #2a5bbf; }
.status-fixed    { background: #3fa55f; color: #fff; border-color: #2d7a45; }
.status-tested   { background: #f0c845; color: #3a2e0a; border-color: #b08e1f; }
.status-deferred { background: #ec934a; color: #fff; border-color: #a85f24; }
.status-closed   { background: #374151; color: #fff; border-color: #1f2937; }
.status-open     { background: #d94b4b; color: #fff; border-color: #a33333; }
.status-verified { background: #3fa55f; color: #fff; border-color: #2d7a45; }
.status-draft       { background: #9ca3af; color: #fff; border-color: #6b7280; }
.status-submitted   { background: #3b78e7; color: #fff; border-color: #2a5bbf; }
.status-approved    { background: #3fa55f; color: #fff; border-color: #2d7a45; }
.status-rejected    { background: #d94b4b; color: #fff; border-color: #a33333; }
.status-implemented { background: #8b5cf6; color: #fff; border-color: #6d28d9; }
.status-completed   { background: #2d7a45; color: #fff; border-color: #1f5733; }
.status-superseded  { background: #f0c845; color: #3a2e0a; border-color: #b08e1f; }
.status-retired     { background: #374151; color: #fff; border-color: #1f2937; }

table.report {
  width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; border: 1px solid #d1d5db; border-top: none;
  margin: 0; font-size: 0.85rem; border-radius: 0 0 4px 4px; overflow: hidden; background: #fff;
}
table.report thead tr { background: #1f2937; }
table.report thead th {
  padding: 0.55rem 0.8rem; color: #f9fafb; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.78rem;
  text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-align: left;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #111827; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap;
}
table.report tbody tr { transition: background 0.1s; background: #fff; }
/* Zebra for data rows without data-tw-status (footer.js sets attribute from STATUS column). */
table.report.sortable tbody tr:nth-child(even):not([data-tw-status]) { background: #f9fafb; }
table.report.sortable tbody tr:hover:not([data-tw-status]) { background-color: #eef2ff !important; }
table.report tbody td { padding: 0.55rem 0.8rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e7eb; vertical-align: middle; color: #1f2937; }
table.report tbody td a {
  font-family: "SF Mono", Menlo, Consolas, monospace; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600;
  color: #1d4ed8; background: transparent; padding: 0; border-radius: 0; text-decoration: none;
}
table.report tbody td a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }


/* Fossil tr.row* — left stripe on first td (inset box-shadow; use first-of-type for whitespace in <tr>) */
table.report.sortable tbody tr:not([data-tw-status]).row0 td:first-of-type {
  box-shadow: inset 5px 0 0 #2d7a45 !important;
}
table.report.sortable tbody tr:not([data-tw-status]).row1 td:first-of-type {
  box-shadow: inset 5px 0 0 #a33333 !important;
}
table.report.sortable tbody tr:not([data-tw-status]).row2 td:first-of-type {
  box-shadow: inset 5px 0 0 #2a5bbf !important;
}
table.report.sortable tbody tr:not([data-tw-status]).row3 td:first-of-type {
  box-shadow: inset 5px 0 0 #b08e1f !important;
}
table.report.sortable tbody tr:not([data-tw-status]).row4 td:first-of-type {
  box-shadow: inset 5px 0 0 #a85f24 !important;
}
table.report.sortable tbody tr:not([data-tw-status]).row5 td:first-of-type {
  box-shadow: inset 5px 0 0 #1f2937 !important;
}

/* Ticket Detail */
.twowiki-tkt-shell {
  background: #fff; border: 1px solid #d1d5db; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden;
}
.twowiki-tkt-meta {
  background: #f3f4f6; color: #1f2937; padding: 1.25rem 2rem 1rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #d1d5db; border-left: 4px solid #f59e0b;
}
.twowiki-tkt-id { margin: 0 0 0.6rem; font-size: 0.78rem; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; }
.twowiki-tkt-id .tktDspLabel { font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: #374151; font-size: 0.72rem; }
.twowiki-tkt-id #hash-tk,
.twowiki-tkt-id code {
  font-family: "SF Mono", Menlo, Consolas, monospace; font-size: 0.76rem; color: #111827;
  background: #fff; padding: 0.2em 0.5em; border-radius: 3px; border: 1px solid #d1d5db;
}
.twowiki-tkt-id .copy-button {
  background: #fff; border: 1px solid #9ca3af;
  border-radius: 3px; color: #374151; cursor: pointer; padding: 0.1em 0.35em; font-size: 0.7rem;
}
.twowiki-tkt-title { font-size: 1.45rem; font-weight: 800; margin: 0 0 0.7rem; color: #0f172a; line-height: 1.25; }
.twowiki-tkt-badges { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.4rem; margin-bottom: 0.85rem; }
.tw-badge {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.2em 0.65em;
  font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.03em; border-radius: 2px;
  border: 1px solid transparent; color: #ffffff;
}
.tw-badge.tw-type { background: #3b78e7; border-color: #2a5bbf; }
.tw-badge.tw-status { background: #ec934a; border-color: #a85f24; }
.tw-badge.tw-tags { background: #3fa55f; border-color: #2d7a45; color: #ffffff; font-family: "SF Mono", Menlo, monospace; font-size: 0.7rem; text-transform: none; font-weight: 600; }
.tw-badge.tw-path {
  background: #f9fafb; border-color: #374151; color: #1f2937;
  font-size: 0.7rem; font-family: "SF Mono", Menlo, monospace; text-transform: none; font-weight: 600;
}
.twowiki-footer-link { font-size: 0.78rem; color: #4b5563; }
.twowiki-footer-link a { color: #1d4ed8 !important; text-decoration: none !important; font-weight: 600; }
.twowiki-footer-link a:hover { text-decoration: underline !important; }

.twowiki-doc { padding: 1.5rem 2rem; }
.twowiki-doc .markdown { line-height: 1.65; color: #374151; }
/* Constrain prose to a comfortable measure (~78ch) but let block elements span full width */
.twowiki-doc p,
.twowiki-doc li { max-width: 78ch; }
.twowiki-doc h2 { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 600; color: #111827; margin: 1.5rem 0 0.6rem; padding-bottom: 0.3rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e7eb; }
.twowiki-doc p { margin: 0 0 0.85rem; }
.twowiki-doc ol, .twowiki-doc ul { margin: 0 0 0.85rem; padding-left: 1.5rem; }
.twowiki-doc li { margin-bottom: 0.3rem; }
.twowiki-doc code {
  font-family: "SF Mono", Menlo, Consolas, monospace; font-size: 0.85em;
  background: #f3f4f6; padding: 0.1em 0.35em; border-radius: 3px; color: #1f2937;
  border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
}
.twowiki-doc pre {
  background: #f9fafb; color: #1f2937; padding: 0.9rem 1.1rem; border-radius: 4px;
  border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
  overflow-x: auto; margin: 0.85rem 0; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.55;
}
.twowiki-doc pre code { background: none; padding: 0; color: inherit; border: none; }

.twowiki-doc table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin: 0.85rem 0; font-size: 0.85rem; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; }
.twowiki-doc table thead th {
  background: #f9fafb; padding: 0.45rem 0.75rem; text-align: left; font-weight: 600; color: #374151;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e7eb; font-size: 0.78rem; text-transform: none; letter-spacing: 0;
}
.twowiki-doc table tbody td { padding: 0.45rem 0.75rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #f3f4f6; color: #374151; }
.twowiki-doc table tbody tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; }
.twowiki-doc table tbody tr:hover { background: #f9fafb; }

/* Comments */
hr.twowiki-tkt-comments-hr { border: none; border-top: 1px solid #e5e7eb; margin: 0; }
h2.twowiki-section-h {
  font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  color: #4b5563; margin: 0; padding: 0.75rem 2rem 0.5rem; background: #fafafa; border-top: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
}
.twowiki-tkt-comment { border-top: 1px solid #f3f4f6; }
.twowiki-tkt-comment-meta { padding: 0.85rem 2rem 0; font-size: 0.76rem; color: #6b7280; font-weight: 500; margin: 0; }
.twowiki-tkt-comment-body { padding: 0 2rem 1.25rem; }

footer { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 1rem 2rem; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; text-align: right; border-top: 1px solid #e5e7eb; box-sizing: border-box; }

@media screen and (max-width: 600px) {
  .desktoponly { display: none; }
  nav.mainmenu .hbbtn { display: inline-flex; }
}
@media screen and (max-width: 640px) {
  div.content { padding: 1rem; }
  .twowiki-tkt-meta { padding: 1.5rem 1.25rem 1rem; }
  .twowiki-doc { padding: 1.25rem; }
  .twowiki-tkt-title { font-size: 1.35rem; }
}

/* ============ Admin / Edit mode action bar ============ */
.admin-actionbar {
  display: flex; align-items: stretch; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0;
  margin: 0 0 0.6rem; background: #1f2937;
  border: 1px solid #111827; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden;
  box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
}
.admin-actionbar-tkt {
  margin: 0; border-radius: 0; border-left: none; border-right: none; border-top: none;
}
.admin-action {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
  font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600; color: #e5e7eb !important;
  text-decoration: none !important; border-right: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  transition: background 0.12s, color 0.12s;
}
.admin-action:hover {
  background: #374151; color: #fff !important; text-decoration: none !important;
}
.admin-action-primary {
  background: #3b78e7; color: #fff !important;
}
.admin-action-primary:hover { background: #2a5bbf; }
.admin-action-danger { color: #fca5a5 !important; }
.admin-action-danger:hover { background: #7f1d1d; color: #fff !important; }

/* Per-row "edit" link in admin mode */
.row-actions { width: 1%; white-space: nowrap; text-align: right; padding-right: 0.6rem; }
.row-edit {
  display: inline-block; padding: 0.15em 0.55em;
  font-size: 0.7rem !important; font-weight: 600 !important;
  text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  color: #4b5563 !important; background: #f3f4f6;
  border: 1px solid #d1d5db; border-radius: 3px;
  text-decoration: none !important; font-family: inherit !important;
}
.row-edit:hover {
  background: #1f2937; color: #fff !important; border-color: #1f2937;
}

/* ============ Tag variants ============ */

/* All-Caps */
.tagvariant-caps .status-pill,
.tagvariant-caps .tw-badge {
  text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; font-weight: 500;
  font-size: 0.68rem; padding: 0.25em 0.7em;
}

/* Metallic: glossy sheen + bevel */
.tagvariant-metallic .status-pill,
.tagvariant-metallic .tw-badge {
  background-image: linear-gradient(180deg,
    rgba(255,255,255,0.45) 0%,
    rgba(255,255,255,0.12) 48%,
    rgba(0,0,0,0.10) 52%,
    rgba(0,0,0,0.28) 100%);
  text-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
  box-shadow:
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.55),
    inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.28),
    0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.18);
  font-weight: 700;
}

/* 3D: hard drop shadow + press effect */
.tagvariant-threed .status-pill,
.tagvariant-threed .tw-badge {
  box-shadow:
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.4),
    0 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.4),
    0 3px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
  text-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
  transition: transform 0.08s, box-shadow 0.08s;
  font-weight: 800;
}
.tagvariant-threed .status-pill:hover,
.tagvariant-threed .tw-badge:hover {
  transform: translateY(1px);
  box-shadow:
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.4),
    0 1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.4),
    0 2px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
}

/* Outline: transparent fill, colored border+text */
.tagvariant-outline .status-pill,
.tagvariant-outline .tw-badge {
  background: transparent !important;
  border-width: 1.5px;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-shadow: none;
}
.tagvariant-outline .status-active,
.tagvariant-outline .status-open,
.tagvariant-outline .status-rejected   { color: #a33333 !important; border-color: #a33333 !important; }
.tagvariant-outline .status-review,
.tagvariant-outline .status-submitted  { color: #2a5bbf !important; border-color: #2a5bbf !important; }
.tagvariant-outline .status-fixed,
.tagvariant-outline .status-verified,
.tagvariant-outline .status-approved,
.tagvariant-outline .status-completed  { color: #2d7a45 !important; border-color: #2d7a45 !important; }
.tagvariant-outline .status-tested,
.tagvariant-outline .status-superseded { color: #8a6a18 !important; border-color: #b08e1f !important; }
.tagvariant-outline .status-deferred   { color: #a85f24 !important; border-color: #a85f24 !important; }
.tagvariant-outline .status-closed,
.tagvariant-outline .status-retired    { color: #1f2937 !important; border-color: #1f2937 !important; }
.tagvariant-outline .status-draft      { color: #4b5563 !important; border-color: #6b7280 !important; }
.tagvariant-outline .status-implemented{ color: #6d28d9 !important; border-color: #6d28d9 !important; }

/* Glow: colored outer halo */
.tagvariant-glow .status-pill,
.tagvariant-glow .tw-badge {
  box-shadow:
    inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.2),
    0 0 8px 0 currentColor,
    0 0 14px -2px currentColor;
  font-weight: 700;
}

/* KEY legend table (footer.js adds .twowiki-status-key) */
table.report.twowiki-status-key {
  width: 100%;
  border: 1px solid #d1d5db;
  border-radius: 4px 4px 0 0;
  margin: 0 0 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: #fff;
  border-collapse: collapse;
}
table.report.twowiki-status-key tbody td {
  padding: 0.45rem 0.55rem;
  text-align: center;
  vertical-align: middle;
  border-right: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
  border-bottom: none;
  background: #fafafa;
}
table.report.twowiki-status-key tbody td:last-child { border-right: none; }

/* Ticket/wiki edit bar — Fossil uses div.sectionmenu; some pages use div.submenu */
div.sectionmenu,
div.submenu {
  display: flex;
  align-items: stretch;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0;
  padding: 0;
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 0.76rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  background: #1f2937;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #111827;
}
div.sectionmenu > a.button:link,
div.sectionmenu > a.button:visited,
div.submenu a:link,
div.submenu a:visited {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 0.55rem 1rem;
  color: #e5e7eb !important;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  font-weight: 700 !important;
  border: none;
  border-right: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
  border-radius: 0;
  background: transparent;
  transition: background 0.12s, color 0.12s;
}
div.sectionmenu > a.button:hover,
div.submenu a:hover {
  background: #374151 !important;
  color: #fff !important;
}
div.sectionmenu > a.button[href*="tktnew"],
div.submenu a[href*="tktnew"] {
  background: #3b78e7 !important;
  color: #fff !important;
}
div.sectionmenu > a.button[href*="tktnew"]:hover,
div.submenu a[href*="tktnew"]:hover {
  background: #2a5bbf !important;
}

/* TAGS column: chips must win over table td defaults (this layer is last in apply merge). */
table.report td.twowiki-tag-cell { white-space: normal; vertical-align: middle; }
table.report td.twowiki-tag-cell .twowiki-tag-wrap {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.28rem;
}
table.report td.twowiki-tag-cell .twowiki-tag-chip {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 0.14rem 0.5rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  line-height: 1.3;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #3730a3;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #eef2ff 0%, #e0e7ff 100%);
  border: 1px solid #c7d2fe;
  box-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7) inset;
}
table.report td.twowiki-tag-cell .twowiki-tag-chip:hover {
  background: #dbeafe;
  border-color: #93c5fd;
  color: #1e3a8a;
}

/* (repeat) Report row stripes — must be last in this file so TAG/td rules do not override */
/* ----- Report data rows: left stripe via data-tw-status (set in footer.js; avoids :has() + table quirks) ----- */
table.report.sortable tbody tr[data-tw-status="active"] { background: #f9fafb !important; }
table.report.sortable tbody tr[data-tw-status="active"] td:first-of-type {
  box-shadow: inset 5px 0 0 #a33333 !important;
}
table.report.sortable tbody tr[data-tw-status="active"]:hover { background: #f1f5f9 !important; }

table.report.sortable tbody tr[data-tw-status="open"] { background: #f9fafb !important; }
table.report.sortable tbody tr[data-tw-status="open"] td:first-of-type {
  box-shadow: inset 5px 0 0 #a33333 !important;
}
table.report.sortable tbody tr[data-tw-status="open"]:hover { background: #f1f5f9 !important; }

table.report.sortable tbody tr[data-tw-status="review"] { background: #f9fafb !important; }
table.report.sortable tbody tr[data-tw-status="review"] td:first-of-type {
  box-shadow: inset 5px 0 0 #2a5bbf !important;
}
table.report.sortable tbody tr[data-tw-status="review"]:hover { background: #f1f5f9 !important; }

table.report.sortable tbody tr[data-tw-status="fixed"] td:first-of-type {
  box-shadow: inset 5px 0 0 #2d7a45 !important;
}

/* Main column: lovable layer sets div.content { max-width: 1000px } earlier in the merge.
   Ticket pages (/tktview) must match reports — reinforce so nothing (cache, older rules) keeps 1000px. */
body div.wiki > div.content,
body.tkt div.content,
body[class*="rpage-"] div.content {
  max-width: 1280px !important;
  margin-left: auto !important;
  margin-right: auto !important;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
